product_overview: GoalAlign is a performance management portal for employees, managers, and admins to manage goals, quarterly check-ins, approvals, and audit visibility. The backend uses Next.js server actions with Prisma and SQLite to persist workflow data and support role-based performance lifecycle operations.
core_goals: Support end-to-end goal creation, review, approval, and status tracking
Enable quarterly check-in submission and retrieval for performance measurement
Provide managers with bulk and individual goal approval actions
Maintain a system-wide audit trail of operational activity
Persist all workflow changes reliably in SQLite via server actions

features.name: Goal Management
features.description: Allows users to retrieve active goals, create new goals, and update goal statuses individually or in bulk.
user_flows: GET /api/actions/getGoals -> Receive 200 with Goal[] for active goals -> Display goal list for user review

POST /api/actions/createGoal with valid userId, title, description, thrustArea, and kpis -> Receive 200 with created Goal -> Goal is stored in SQLite and available in subsequent GET /api/actions/getGoals calls
POST /api/actions/createGoal with missing or invalid authenticated payload -> Receive 4xx error response -> Goal is not created
POST /api/actions/updateGoalStatus with valid goalId, status, and managerEmail -> Receive 200 with updated status object -> Goal status changes and approval/rejection logic is logged
POST /api/actions/updateGoalStatus with invalid goalId or unauthorized request -> Receive error response -> Goal status remains unchanged
POST /api/actions/batchUpdateGoalStatus with multiple goalIds and valid status -> Receive 200 with bulk update result -> All matching goals update together

POST /api/actions/batchUpdateGoalStatus with one or more invalid goalIds -> Receive error response or partial failure object -> Only valid updates are applied or the batch is rejected based on validation

features.name: Check-in Management
features.description: Supports retrieval and upsert of quarterly check-ins tied to goals, employee feedback, and achievement values.
user_flows: POST /api/actions/getCheckIns -> Receive 200 with CheckIn[] -> Show all saved check-ins for review

POST /api/actions/saveCheckIn with valid goalId, quarter, actualAchievement, managerFeedback, and employeeEmail -> Receive 200 with saved CheckIn -> New check-in is persisted or existing record is updated
POST /api/actions/saveCheckIn with invalid goalId or malformed achievement data -> Receive error response -> Check-in is not saved
POST /api/actions/saveCheckIn with missing employeeEmail or unauthorized request -> Receive error response -> No upsert occurs

features.name: Audit Logs
features.description: Provides a read-only view of system actions joined with user and goal information for admin review.
user_flows: POST /api/actions/getAuditLogs -> Receive 200 with AuditLog[] -> Render system activity history with user and goal context
POST /api/actions/getAuditLogs when no audit records exist -> Receive 200 with empty array -> Display empty-state messaging
POST /api/actions/getAuditLogs during backend failure -> Receive error response -> Admin audit view can surface a retrieval failure state

features.name: Goal Management
features.description: Server actions handling creation, retrieval, and status updates of performance goals.

endpoints.description: Retrieve all active goals from the SQLite database
Insert a new goal record into the database and log the creation
Update goal status and automatically log approval/rejection logic
Bulk update multiple goal statuses at once

features.name: Check-in Management
features.description: Server actions for saving quarterly check-in achievements.

endpoints.description: Upsert a check-in and log the action
Fetch the audit log records joined with users and goals
